message:
test: add tests for deacon/manager.go and deacon/pause.go (gt-dg58u)

Introduce tmuxOps interface in manager.go to enable dependency injection
for testing. Add comprehensive tests covering zombie session detection,
session kill failure handling, pause file corruption, and IsPaused error
handling. Coverage goes from 0% to 86-100% on manager.go methods and
75-100% on pause.go functions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
